Author: Sansflaire
Name: PanacheUI
Punchline: SkiaSharp-powered UI rendering framework. Give your plugins what Sansflaire lacks.
Description: PanacheUI is a vector graphics UI framework for Dalamud plugins, backed by SkiaSharp (the same engine as Chrome and Flutter). Provides a node tree, CSS-like styling, layout engine, and smooth rendering — far beyond what vanilla ImGui can offer.
